questions.question: What practice during the Lord's Supper does Paul criticize?
options: Some eating and drinking while others go hungry
questions.answer: Some eating and drinking while others go hungry

questions.question: Paul says whoever eats the bread or drinks the cup unworthily will be guilty of what?
options: The body and blood of the Lord
questions.answer: The body and blood of the Lord

questions.question: Paul received the instructions about the Lord's Supper directly from the Lord.
This cup is the new covenant in my _____. Do this, as often as you drink it, in remembrance of me.
Let a man _____ himself, and so let him eat of the bread and drink of the cup.
